transcript.text:
[Firewood?]
[And a grill?]
[Let's heat it up]
[KBBQ Party]
[Pork belly on a grill]
[With its tasty pairs]
[Duck meat as well]
[Don't forget about me!]
[Iron Plate Fried Rice]
How's it this good? It's crazy
Amazing
[lol]
[How many servings did she eat this time?]
Hello everyone
I'm here to eat some meat
I've been wanting to try this place

They put firewood under a huge grill for BBQ
I've been wanting to come since Summer
And I finally got to come here
[City of Gwangmyeong, Gyeonggi Province] [Jangjak Nanro Pork Belly & Duck]
Hello~!
The grill is huge!
It's even bigger in person
Amazing
What should we eat first? There's the menu!
The menu
Excuse me,
Can I order 10 servings of pork belly,
[Just laugh]
10 servings of pork belly and 5 servings of duck
[I guess I'll bring it out]
It's going to be great

They put firewood under here
And the grill heats up
Sigh.. 15 servings by herself
[Keep stacking the meat!]
[10 servings of pork belly]
[Stack up duck meat as well]
[5 servings of duck meat]
[Beautiful plates of pork belly and duck]
Looks tasty That's a lot
It's our first time serving this much food
It looks delicious
I love the thickness
I'll cook them a little and take them out since they won't taste as good if they're just sitting on the grill
[Let's put that pork belly]
[Incredible]
[Take some out before it's done]

[Cut them up]
[Can you hear the sizzling goodness?]
-Cook the garlic and kimchi too -Okay!
It looks so good
Let's try a piece first
The fat is savory
Delicious
They cooked pretty fast at first, but it won't get burnt as quickly because of the grease
[More firewood]
[That's a strong fire]
[Kimchi to go with the pork belly]
They don't give kimchi like this as a whole But I made a special request
To have it added to the bill, so they agreed to do it for me
Whole kimchi will taste even better
This isn't ssamjang or dwenjang, but it's good!
Pickled perilla leaf

Let's move these over to start a new batch of meat
How will you eat it all?
I can do it
It's still too much
[I'll be fine]
[Open up the hole and the fire gets stronger]
Let's cook some duck
The fire power instantly went up
I love how the grill is greased up
Let's flip
Someone said that you won't gain weight from eating duck meat
[Well, you just don't gain weight period]
[Meat on lettuce leaf]
[With ssamjang (soybean seasoning paste)]
[All in 1 bite]
[Kimchi is a must for KBBQ]

I had KBBQ on a stone grill at Ulleung Island just like this
But it was so windy that it didn't feel satisfying
Wind wind wind wind
Help!
[But it's peaceful here]
Let's try duck meat
It looks so tasty
[She's talking fast all because it's that good]
Some duck meat can get very rubbery But this is really tender
Soft
Duck is also good with perilla leaf
I actually don't know It's just a speculation
[It really is good!]
It's good
What? There's more
Sticky rice to go with the meat

[More food items on this menu]
There's more
[Let's eat first and think later]
Excuse me, can I order cheese dip?
Of course
I'll take 1, please
Thank you
Let's put it all here
Open this up
Pork belly
[You have to grill pork belly on high heat]
Check the color of this kimchi
Let's sprinkle some salt this time
Black pepper too
Am I doing this right? That might be too much
Whatever

[Creating a lot of smoke]
The fire is too strong!
I'll put them on this lid
That's really convenient
Keeping it warm
Let's eat it with kimchi
It's cooked so well
Pork belly with kimchi
[Thumbs up]
[Hot]
It's mozzarella, so you need to scoop and cut with scissors
[Understood]
[The food is still too hot]
It really doesn't cut
Scissors
This is eye-opening

Amazing
The cheese itself is delicious
This is really good Take some cheese
Cut with scissors
Take a piece of kimchi
Cheese kimchi pork belly!
This particular cheese is really tasty
It's really milky
The savoriness of both foods
There's a party in my mouth
[Makes a pun joke]
This cheese is really good
It's hard to taste that authentic mozzarella flavor these days
Did you just see that?
[I drank it with my face]
Hopefully we got that on camera

You're a devil
[Inhaling the rest of the meat]
It's hot! Why are these so hot?
Let's move the kimchi over too
It's like old stains are coming off
Do you still think I can't finish everything?
[I'll have to show you]
-I can eat more than this -No, don't do that
You will feel ill later when you get older
[Thank you for worrying about me]
[Let's grill the rest]
I wanted to get some fried rice, but they're closing very soon
So I don't have much time
We'll have to do just 1 serving
Yummy
Excuse me, Can I get 1 order of fried rice?

The meat has to come off
I'll take them off the grill
Can I get 1 serving of fried rice?
Can you make it with the meat?
It will taste good with duck meat
Don't put pork belly
Let's cut up duck meat into small pieces
[Toss it over the cut-up duck meat]
[Fried rice is ready]
Thank you
That looks delicious
Let's pour the meat on here
Some on here too
I have to take a photo of this
Let's get something to drink first
This is a little spicy

-Have some when it gets too greasy -Thank you
Let's try it now
How's it this good? That's crazy
This is amazing
Get some fried rice
Get some cheese
This is probably going to burn the inside of my mouth, right?
[It's here!]
[Alert!]
[Can't open her drink]
The roof of my mouth is burnt
I forgive you because you taste good
I really want to eat the fried rice, but it's scorching hot so I can't
Let's eat this first
Is it okay to eat now?
I don't think so

[Here's a plate]
Take it like this
Can I try it?
Thank you
It gets better over time
Then I'll take a little bit
This is fun
I love it
It works well
[Let's enjoy it now]
[She's left by herself now]
The rice is really tasty
Last bowl
[lol]
She sure eats a lot
Amazing

That was a good meal
Thanks everyone!
Will you be able to walk out on your own?
Yes I can!
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
